subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to arrange a 30-minute call to explore a potential partnership. The following windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those work for you, send over your preferred option and we can take it from there.

On the contact-details request: I’m not able to share internal email addresses, phone numbers, or personnel directory information. For official outreach, please use the contact details available on our public website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
